name: cursorblame
description: Inline git blame on the active cursor line — hover to reveal, click to open the commit on your remote.

cursorblame.enabled.description: Enable or disable inline blame annotations.

cursorblame.format.markdownDescription: Format template for the blame annotation. Available tokens: `{author}`, `{timeAgo}`, `{date}`, `{summary}`, `{sha}`, `{shortSha}`.

cursorblame.maxSummaryLength.description: Maximum characters of the commit summary to display before truncating.

cursorblame.foregroundColor.markdownDescription: Color for the blame annotation text. Leave empty for a muted theme-aware default. Accepts any CSS color (e.g. `#888888`, `rgba(128,128,128,0.7)`) or a theme token prefixed with `theme:` (e.g. `theme:editorCodeLens.foreground`).

cursorblame.debounceMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after the cursor stops moving before showing blame.

cursorblame.ignoreWhitespace.description: Ignore whitespace-only changes when computing blame (passes -w to git blame).
